videos.title: The Objection Framework That Closes More Deals
videos.description:
Audit Your Sales Team For Free In 2 Minutes - https://salesaudit.saleschief.co/adam-fj3tbu0e

Most salespeople think that objections happen at the end of the call. But those sales objections actually surface throughout the sales process, often in the first 10-15 minutes! Being sharp with your objection handling from the start is crucial, so be ready to handle them as easily as saying your name. Listen to this sales advice for better sales techniques.
